Service Locations

Where We Serve Across North Carolina

From Concord to Gastonia, Monroe to Salisbury — we bring the signing table to you, wherever you are.

Primary Hub • Mecklenburg County

Charlotte, NC

Full-service mobile notary and loan signing throughout Charlotte's neighborhoods, hospitals, offices, and residential communities.

Mobile notary coverage throughout Gastonia and Gaston County. Available for same-day and after-hours signing appointments.

Mobile notary services in Mint Hill for real estate transactions, business documents, and personal notarizations — we come to you.

Salisbury, NC

Mooresville, NC

Mobile notary serving Mooresville and Lake Norman area for real estate closings, refinances, and personal document notarizations.

Hospital & Care Facilities

Compassionate mobile notary service for patients at hospitals, nursing homes, and assisted living facilities across the Charlotte region.

What We Notarize

Services Available at Every Location

Every service is available at your location — home, office, hospital, or anywhere across North Carolina.

🏠

Real Estate Closings

Purchase, sale, and refinance loan signings with a certified Notary Signing Agent at your location.

📄

Legal Documents

Wills, trusts, power of attorney, affidavits, and all legal documents notarized on-site.

💼

Business Documents

Corporate resolutions, contracts, agreements, and business filings handled promptly and professionally.

🪪

Personal Documents

Vehicle titles, medical directives, I-9 verifications, and more — wherever you need us.

🏥

Hospital Visits

Sensitive and compassionate service for patients who need documents notarized at medical facilities.

⏰

After-Hours & Same-Day

Urgent signings available evenings, weekends, and holidays throughout the Charlotte metro.

Full Coverage Area

Cities & Counties We Serve

We travel throughout Mecklenburg, Union, Cabarrus, Gaston, Rowan, Iredell, and surrounding NC counties. Don't see your city? Call us — we likely cover it.

Charlotte Concord Gastonia Monroe Matthews Mint Hill Salisbury Mooresville Huntersville Cornelius Davidson Kannapolis Harrisburg Stallings Indian Trail Waxhaw Weddington Pineville Belmont Mount Holly Statesville Fort Mill, SC Rock Hill, SC
